ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data is real-time or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used for trading */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_stock_data" (
  "stock_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data is real-time or historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_stock_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_stock_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES stock_data ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_stock_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)
